examples: Police were shocked by the viciousness of the assault.
Your brutality arises not from viciousness, I think, but from fear.
It has scary viciousness in its eyes. It doesn't like you much at all.
It is unlikely that the current battle will reach the viciousness of the scraps over Tammany Hall.
Those who missed some of their favourite shows might reflect it is better than any reality TV for low viciousness and high drama.
